name: Jicama and Pepper Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Peppers, sweet, red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or large heavy skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, gingerroot, and garlic. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add peppers and jicama. Stir-fry over high heat for 2 minutes.
4. Add soy sauce and sugar. Stir-fry for an additional 1-1/2 minutes or until peppers are crisp-tender.
5. Sprinkle with lemon juice and sesame oil (if using). Stir and serve. Makes 6 side-dish servings.
Per serving: 79 calories, 1 gram protein, 9 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 345 milligrams sodium, 117 milligrams potassium, 1 gram fiber, 71% of the Daily Value (DV) vitamin C.
